texto: Treatment: Deep Skin Cleansing. Description: Removes impurities, blackheads, and dead cells, leaving the skin renewed. Duration: 60 minutes. Price: 50€. Ideal to do once a month.

Treatment: Botox Application. Description: Prevents and reduces expression wrinkles on the forehead and around the eyes. Fast and almost painless procedure. Duration: 30 minutes. Price: 150€ per zone. Prior evaluation required.

Aura Esthetics is open Monday to Friday, from 09:00 to 19:00. The address is Beauty Street, 123, Lisbon. To book an appointment, the client must provide their Full Name, Desired Date/Time, and the Service.
